violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Rinse station at coffee prep sink has build up of coffee residue. -Reside/debris in bottom of small refrigerator below espresso machine.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use cold cups on floor in East side storage room.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Bar ice bin used for cold holding mixers does not drain to plumbing. *This is a temporary solution for out of order cooler. Recommend using bucket for drain water. If installed long term, should be ran to drain line.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -No hand soap at hand sink at East dish pit.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -No paper towel dispenser at hand sink at East dish pit

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth used at espresso machine is not kept in a solution between uses. -Sani Bucket found at less than 150ppm Quat.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Bar shake pitcher left dirty from yesterday's service.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
